testcase.name: testBestMove(String, List, Integer)[1]

=== Engine decision statistics === FEN: 3R4/8/P4pk1/rP4p1/8/8/1K6/8 w - - 3 65 Side to move: White Expected best moves: [Kc1, Kc2, Kc3] Baseline evaluation: +1.24 pawns Search configuration: runtimeCores=24, searchThreads=1, lazySmpThreads=1, rootParallelLimit=24, ttSize=64 MB, multiThreaded=no Depth target: 8, deepest completed iteration: 8 Chosen move: Kc3 -> +1.35 pawns (Δ vs baseline: +0.11) [rank #3] Engine top move: Rd7 -> +2.15 pawns (Δ vs chosen: -0.07) Nodes visited: 479854, null-move prunes: 8365, search duration: 3033 ms Top candidates by evaluation: 1.
